reviews.review_description:
It's a port so don't expect freedom and like in other games, cutscenes are on a flat screen.
Graphics are decent, gameplay is smooth but I sometimes, towards the end, I experienced lag for some reason. 
No skill is required, you have the lazer and you just unload your bullets till the enemy dies no matter if you are just hitting the head multiple times. Bullets are easy to have and no clue how to check the hp. If hit, you just have to wait a little bit.
You get to have 3 weapons but the primary, that you cannot change is not really useful in the end as enemies are harder.
I had a blast and I wished there was a final boss but it's like the original game.
I recommend it but not for the whole price unless there's a multiplayer option as that would be a game changer.

This is my new favorite right now. Just finished RM2 and it was my favorite. Now BS is filling the void. I am absolutely loving the sh*t out of BulletStorm. I'm not sure what issues others are having but I haven't had any issues whatsoever. Everything works great and I'm 3-4 hrs in. If you're on the fence about this one I would get it as you can get a refund if you don't like it. Tons o' fun.

The game for me was not fun and felt underwhelming. The graphics are also disappointing for a game of this size with flat backgrounds and overall below what you usually find in other single-player titles on the Quest (even small indies). The resolution seems to be somewhat low as well. The gunplay is the typical hip fire into anything that moves, and I think it gets old pretty fast especially with the bad AI. The VR implementation (like gunplay, reloading mechanics, etc) is also not great, and it feels more like a VR mod than a proper VR port. If you like these types of games, then I think Warhammer 40000 Battle Sister (even with some big issues) to be a much better game to get (better graphics, better gunplay, better environment, better enemies, etc). For what you get I think this game is extremely overpriced, and I only recommend getting it on a big sale and if you love the original.
DO NOT BUY THIS GAME. STUTTERS LIKE CRAZY. REFUNDING RIGHT NOW.

So far im enjoying the story the game mechanics is simple the gun play is enjoyable
Not bad on a quest 3 graphics look good haven't ran into any studer cut scenes look awesome like a movie.
Better the playing on console feels like you can enjoy the experience more they did a well job porting it over to vr so I recommend this game its a fun shooter

reviews.review_title: IT IS UNPLAYABLE! DO NOT BUY!
reviews.review_description: This game is 100% unplayable.There is horrible stuttering and freezing every other second. I tried rebooting my Quest 3 and reinstalled the game and the stuttering is still there. Unfortunately I purchased this product a while ago and tried it only now, so no refund for me. Please DO NOT BUY IT. Do not waste your money on something broken. I don't even know why META allows this kind of  bugged software on their platform.

I don't know what some other reviews are thinking when complaining about the graphics. These graphics running on a mobile chip standalone is really impressive!
True, there are hiccups when enemies spawn in, I bet this is because of the engine, but that's an old game, you can't do miracles.
I got this on sale for EUR 11 and it's worth every penny.
I own Bulletstorm on PC and it's just incredible to play it in VR.
This level of graphics on Quest I've seen so far only in the Doom 3 port by Dr Beef.
Good job, Devs, worth every penny!
I have been enjoying it a lot. Doing skillshots is so much better in vr. The game looks even better after latest update and horde mode adds replayability. Highly recommend.

This game is fun. It's everything that makes a silly 2000's shooter, but you are in VR so no one else will witness the cringy bits but you. I am not done with the game yet, but I bet it will feel short. The good news is this game has a lot of replayability with all the weird weapon options and environmental kills. I think the buggy launch and $30 price made this a tough sell when games like RE4 sell for that. Definitely still worth it (far less disappointing than the similarly priced Stride Fates). 100% worth getting on a sale and worth full price if you want a zany shooter. I really wish this had done better so People Can Fly could go back into their catalogue and also port the Painkiller series.
Dont buy
Ergonomy is a disaster. RG for putting the gun where ??? Stuck at the beginning of the game. Loved the flat version but this one is just horrible.

reviews.review_title: This is what most of us been wanting!
reviews.review_description: People complain about anything and everything nowadays.. this is what most of us wanted for VR. Ports of our favorite games. This game looks good IMO. The cute scenes was handled very well, but you can tell those weren’t upgraded. But I’m enjoying this and wish most people would have given it a try.. you can always return it. I wish I would have supported it earlier. But I did have a lot of game backloged.

I bought this when it was on sale. It played fine on my Quest 3s. I did encounter a few points where the game didn’t progress properly and I had to exit out and reload the last checkpoint.
Other than some minor issues, I feel it is a good port of a single-player shooter. I enjoyed the mechanic of grabbing enemies from the distance and pulling them near or pushing them into hazards. I like this kind of experience in a VR setting, I just wish they had polished it some. It definitely does not look like the screenshots or video reel above, but not so horrible that it wasn’t on par with some of the other games currently available here.
Put it on your wishlist and wait until it goes on sale.

Graphics are not as good as the trailer. Game play is so shi++y! Seriously wish I didn't waste money on this. Try hellsweeper or sairento if you want powers and sick combat! cutscenes and cutscenes and cutscenes and cutscenes......

reviews.review_title: Good fun but should be longer
reviews.review_description: I really enjoyed this game but it was over too quickly it would have been so much better if it was twice as long. I've been hoping for a part 2 as the ending left it open.

reviews.review_title: This game is a must play
reviews.review_description: This game is so fun. I can’t stop playing it. The graphics good the guns good everything about the game is so good that I can’t stop playing it and what makes it even more fun is that you have the ability to stick up the middle finger not every game has the ability to stick up the middle finger, but this game does and it has a great campaign mode

Such amazing gameplay i love the story to where it was headed there are so many different ways to kill people and the one thing that gets hard to get used to is there is no jumping but all in all it is a great game deffinitly worth the 40.99 please make a sequl i want to know what happens next.

Just as I said. Disregard the graphics - they are from 2011, like the game itself. Pure fun. This is the gaming that we have lost: over the top violence, mature language and a sexy female character. Beautiful in it's offensiveness. I highly recommend.

Hi ! The game is very cool, a really nice adaptation ! There is only on small detail which is a little immersion-breaking to me : I didn't find any option to remove the laser pointer from the guns.

For me, it's uncessary and distractive, if the dev see this and got time to make option to remove it, it will be awesome !

However, i followed the updates and the dev did a great job to improve it, it's a very fun game to (re)discover in VR !

This was one of my favorite straight up action games from the Xbox 360 era. The VR translation is amazing 🤩! This game is super fun in a flat screen TV and even on Nintendo switch but it is really awesome in VR. The action melds perfectly in VR. My suggestion is set the tether to head tracked. That made all the difference for me. I hope that being in VR breathes enough life into the franchise to get a sequel!!!

Lots of fun. Hardcore, old school violence.

I updated this review from 4 to 5 star after finishing the game due to some of the epic experiences and vast details landscapes and environments. 

Also the range of unique and crazy weapons is an absolute blast. Literally!

I downloaded the free trial, and within 15mins, I bought the full game, brilliant graphics and the environments are awesome, cool guns and combat, and great humour.. Gear of war type game 😃😍😃😍😃😍😀

Great work by all the team.

Thank you

Looks amazing!
Interesting story.
Furious gameplay.
Lots of VR interaction.

Adult themes and language!

Really does not have any competition on Quest. This is a beautifully polished game!
Too linear, the story is predictable and obvious. With better gameplay, it could be much better. For the rest, it's not bad. Perhaps a bit too short.

reviews.review_title: Bulletstorm VR is a must have
reviews.review_description:
Been wanting to check out this game for a while,and I pulled the trigger today and bought it while it was on sale,and I’m so happy I did,this game is exactly what I have been looking for.I definitely recommend this game,and it’s on $14.99 down from $29.99 for another 2 days
Great find,and a great buy,I’m glad I decided to finally buy it,hopefully there will be more games like this from the developers

One of the most underrated fps games made. I played this on ps3 when it first came out and also on the 360. I also have it on switch (gyro controls are great on that as well). 

This VR edition is by far the best version. Makes you feel like you’re in the game and embody the character. Hope this developer and others remake other legendary titles from the past. Imagine the Transformers cybertron games in VR 🤩. If you’re a fan of this genre don’t miss out on Bulletstorm in VR!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for your lovely 5 star review. <3

reviews.review_title: A Storm Of Bullets Mark My Way
reviews.review_description: I couldn’t believe what I was seeing. One of my favourite games of 2011. In VR. The graphics are amazing with the original cutscenes and dialog not to mention the violence. The immersion is staggering you feel like you’re in a video game not just playing one. Only reason I am not playing instead of writing this review the Quest 3 is out of juice and recharging for next time   I’m finding making those  combos more easier in VR than I remember in the console version. And much more fun…

Since there was lots of criticism toward the game at its release, I didn't even put it on my wishlist and kind of forgot about it. Luckily I saw it has a free trial and since I heard devs updated the game for Quest 3 lately, I gave it a try... and to my surprise, I liked it.

I decided to buy the full version and I just finished it yesterday. It was great.
Yes, it's a mindless shooter with a macho humour on steroids, in style of 90s shooters, like Duke Nukem. But what's important is, that it was fun! Graphics are surprisingly good, the scale of the environments is fantastic and set pieces are bombastic and quite awesome.

I didn't even mind flat screen cut scenes. Most were in sbs 3d and looked good and it was fun to follow the story.

I very much recommend this one.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the 5 star review <3

reviews.review_title: AAA Game with great beautiful locations
reviews.review_description:
I was very sceptical,  but this game really surprised me. So much fun in the gameplay, so much eye candy.
We need more ports of AAA flat screen titles like this.

Was wanting to get this when it first came out,but didn't as it didn't look good to play,I had a look again at it a few weeks ago to see if was any better and it was and the reviews were really good now.I bought it and it is amazing,so glad I did.I would find myself looking at the background graphics amazed,.this games action packed,great cut scenes,graphics are so good,gameplays really good.If thinking about buying this game do,you won't be dissapointed,now for the negatives which there's only one and its minor and me just being picky,tribal men could look a bit better but rest all good.

developer_response.body:
Thanks Asbode for your lovely review. <3
We're striving to hit 4.1 star average on the store. If you can consider giving us 5 stars, that would be incredibly helpful.

reviews.review_description: This game is full of breathtaking atmospheres and  fast action. I would love to see more games like this. A lot of the scenarios you are placed in are really cool. It was worth the 40 to me. This is a full game and not just a gimic to get your money.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your 5 star review <3

reviews.review_description: Good graphics and oversized guns Make this game a blast to play. It's fast-paced and the first time I ever kicked my opponent across the room! Lol This game is fun

The original was an easy 5 stars in my opinion so this is really a review for the vr port. When announced initially went to wishlist but held off due to technical launch reports. Hearing they censored it probably killed my interest until they announced uncensored option and on sale I gave it a shot. Graphics aren't bad but I expected a hit in translation. The vr immersivness makes up for lower graphics. Crashed a few times but other then that still a good game. If you never played original you'll have a good time. If you have then the cut levels are a tragedy. extra short Trishka content is not a bonus if they cut half the game for it. Her sword mechanic was underutilized and lacked potential skill shots. My favorite levels made the chopping block and for that alone can't go higher then 3 stars. Easy 5 stars if they restore this content. Might remove some if they don't. I mean controlling a giant robot dinosaur with a remote like the one you are actually holding ... How was this cut! Only addition I could ask is adding weapon bashing having same effect as the kick, would translate better to vr.
Edit: over a year now and not a peep about restoring cut content. Just the same old line about it not fitting VR like we haven't played it before. No reason these levels wouldn't translate just find as the rest if not better in some cases. So lost a star for officially releasing half a game.

developer_response.body: We hear you, Andrew, but just like the Duke, we could not bring everything to the VR version of the game. We understand your disappointment and appreciate your honest review.

reviews.review_description: Being playing this for a few hours and it’s a lot of fun and action- really enjoying it so far!
Great game!

This game takes me back to the good old days of the 360 and now I am reliving it in VR. This game does not get the attention it deserves. More people should give it a try. Looks good and game play is smooth and really fun. I think the devs did a great job with it.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your 5 star review Mad_Dad <3

reviews.review_description: Lord, what a great old-school shooter. It's just amazing that among a pile of forgettable 2-3 hour games and endless roguelikes, you can find such a gem. I’ve never played the original, but I want to thank the developers for this port.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the 5 star review <3

reviews.review_description: Love this in the age of roguelites. You get a great and mindless  way to blow off some steam! Graphics are decent, immersion is there, fun story. We need more campaign FPS games like this one in the quest store.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the 5 star review <3

reviews.review_description:
I wanted this game when it came out because this used to be one of my favorite games on the 360. but heard it was a mess and the controls were janky. I was happy to see the devs cared enough to polish and make this game a lot better. I saw the most recent reviews were talking about how it's updates are now making it really good. So I figured I'd give it a chance. I'm happy I did because it's up there now with one of my favorites. It's really good and loads of fun. They took a ton of good moments from the original game out of the VR version. Like the animatronic mekaton you control and the plant boss. I'm not sure why but I'm guessing it's because it was difficult to turn it into a VR experience. They did add levels where you play as Trishka and you get a laser sword. One thing i wish they did though was find a way to do the interactive cut scenes but they instead just made it into a watchable scene.  Even without a lot of the content it still was awesome. I definitely recommend it if you also loved this game when it came out all those years ago. 
9/10

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing your thoughts! I’m glad to hear the recent updates have turned the game into a fantastic experience for you. Your recommendation is great for fans of the original, and a 9/10 is a solid rating! Thank you for your 5 star review

reviews.review_description: An hour in and I love this game, gives me a slight gears of war vibe

developer_response.body: Glad you're loving it. Thank you for the 5-star review! <3

reviews.review_title: Excellent VR game, a bug is present
reviews.review_description: The game provides one of the best immersive experiences along with an  amazing gameplay. The manual gestures improve the immersion. However, the headhunter sniper rifle does not shoot even when the box on the  target is red. The trigger sound and motion is present, but nothing is fired. Also, the weapon does not charge.

developer_response.body:
Hi LL_CC,

We've had feedback that its not easy to understand how to prime the Headhunter for firing. If you head to our YouTube channel and search for Headhunter, you will see a video that shows you all the actions needed to reload and fire the gun.

If you're still having issues - please reach out to support@peoplecanfly.com - we'd love to help turn your 3 stars into 5 <3

reviews.review_description: It's a really good game once you dial in your settings! Turn on the stereoscopic cutscenes and make sure you use button reload and automatic ammo pickup. Combat is just too fast for the immersive reload and picking up ammo by hand to not feel cumbersome. I also recommend using QGO to up the resolution by 120% and set the framerate to 90hz.

developer_response.body:
Great to hear you appreciate the auto ammo pickup - we want the game to be as immersive as possible but agreed that with the intense action, especially in Horde mode, auto pickup was important.

Thank you so much for your 5-star review - helping us on the road to 4.1 average <3

reviews.review_description: So much love and time poured into this classic shooter that lives on now in glorious VR! I love the GOW type squad shooter games and Bulletstorm fits the bill only now VR brings it more real. What really blew me away was the level of detail you get no shortcuts and is a true console almost PCVR level game but on the Q3! Highly recommend if this is your vibe nothing beats taking cover, locking and loading you blaster rifle and taking careful aim to pluck off the bad guys then sprinting to the next vantage point to strategize on you next objective. If I had to critique anything it would be the lack of drop shadows under the men and enemies it’s picky  but being a professional artist it just completes the look but this is in now way a dealbreaker . Get this game and kick some serious A$$!

developer_response.body: I'm feeling the energy and enthusiasm MCreager! Love it! Thank you so much for the 5 star review.

reviews.review_title: Good but glitch is stopping me
reviews.review_description: I'm stuck at a certain point and can't get passed because the kick isn't working on what it's supposed to work on. I grab the scope gun from the sniper and then there are no more zombies and I try kicking the thing on the right like I saw in a video and it doesn't move and it doesn't light up saying to kick it. I tried restarting from check point and the chapter still nothing. Please fix.

developer_response.body:
Hi MJC102312,

Please can you email support@peoplecanfly.com?
I'm sure we can help you here and take that 3 stars to 5 stars <3

reviews.review_title: Really very good fun now it's patched
reviews.review_description:
This game released in an embarrassing state and probably has done irreparable damage to the reputation of the game and the publisher for pushing it out in such a state. 

However they have since released many patches that have turned this into what it should have been at launch and it's now easily one of the most bombastic and ridiculously fun vr shooters on the market. 

Bulletstorm was a bit overlooked when it came out back in the day but even now years later it still delivers action and gore and fun like nothing else out there. The transition to VR works so incredibly well. Every weapon and skill and environmental kill are so fun to use. 

It's early 2000s era gameplay encapsulated in this outrageously over the top action romp. 

Well worth it.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! I’m glad the patches have improved the game and that you’re enjoying the fun, chaotic VR experience. It really captures the excitement of Bulletstorm! Thank you for your 5-star review.

reviews.review_description: Bulletstorm does a good job in making you feel like a dual welding action hero and just chaining the different moves together really make this worth playing this way.
It won't let me get past chapter 5 need help

developer_response.body:
Hi Stphn2,

Please can you email support@peoplecanfly.com with a description of your problem?

reviews.review_description:
This is very blast and great looking game now! It’s seriously good after all updates.👍
And I really impressed with such a change compared to the initial release.

Very impressive job team!

developer_response.body: You've made our day igenvector! Honestly rewarding to see reviews like this that acknowledge how far we've come from initial launch - we shouldn't have launched how we did but we're thrilled the effort to put things right isn't going unnoticed. Thank you for your 5 star review <3

reviews.review_description: How do you turn on controller based movement?  I've tried every option but no matter what it's head-based.

developer_response.body:
Hey Silentcorp, if you mean the leash aiming, this is in Options > Weapon Mechanics. If you mean using the thumbstick to move and turn, it sounds like you may need to reset your controller layout to default. Go to Options > Controller Inputs > Buttons Layout and Press Y to reset the default. You can swap what each thumbstick does in this same menu under 'Switch Movement Stick'.

If you're still having issues, please reach out to support@peoplecanfly.com
We're hoping we can go from 3 stars to 5 with fixed controller-based movement <3

reviews.review_title: Loved it in 2011, even more in VR!
reviews.review_description:
It's like this game was preemptively made to be played in VR! It's got the same gritty edge I remember on the 360 but far better immersion and stellar graphics. 

I held off getting it originally because of the bug reviews but now that the game has been brought up to snuff, it's top notch. Hopefully previous reviewers will give it another go and update their reviews accordingly.

developer_response.body: The nostalgia sure hits differently in VR, that's for sure! We're happy you can experience the game after it's polished. Here's hoping others take the dive and see how awesome it is now. Enjoy! <3

reviews.review_description:
Updated Review:

Just bumped this up to 5 stars. 🙂

The devs released yet another update with better graphics, a new horde mode, and the weapon reloads got more realistic.

The weapons combat feels more precise now also.

Highly recommended for old school single player FPS fans.

Original Review;

(Played on Quest 3)

I initially bought this in early January and quickly requested a refund.  There were so many issues right from the beginning that I couldn’t enjoy it.

Levels that should have been spectacular were so poorly rendered that there was no immersion.  One early level in particular that used a flat, blurry movie for the distant background looked especially bad.  I almost requested a refund at that point.  But I pressed on since I wasn’t near the two hour refund limit yet.

There were numerous technical issues besides the graphics, but the final straw was a glitch that rendered particle effects in one eye only.  It was almost physically painful to look at.  That’s when I threw in the towel and deleted it.

It’s had several updates since then so gave it another try and picked it up on sale last night.

I’m glad I gave it a second chance!

There are still some issues, but the game has been dramatically transformed from a unenjoyable mess into a very entertaining arcade sci-fi adventure.

The graphics are much better. The early level I mentioned before now looks as it should and the particle rendering glitch has been fixed. It went from a way below average looking Quest game to an above average looking game.  It’s just what I’d hoped a good VR port of the original would look like.

One update that I didn’t think would matter much until I’d tried it is giving you the option to remove the censoring.  With all the mature dialog removed the cut scenes were dull and I ended up skipping them. The dialog of this game is built around foul language and off-color jokes. Censoring it is like censoring a Slipknot album.  Strip the foul language out of most Slipknot songs and there’s little left of the lyrics. Now that the original dialog is available I’m watching all the cut scenes, and even occasionally laughing out loud at some of the corny jokes.  Fans of Gears of War will probably have a great time. (Warning for VR Novices: Watching cut-scenes originally intended for the TV in VR can be extremely nauseating, so you may have to skip them.)

The update release notes list lots of bug fixes, including AI improvements, but the AI still could use some tweaking.  Enemies sometimes get confused and just linger behind cover as your AI companions fire endlessly into it.  It doesn’t occur to either one to move.  But it’s a minor complaint which is easily overlooked in an arcade style game like this.

Once you find the first upgrade, (I don’t want to ruin the surprise for those who don’t know what it is), the combat gets wild, chaotic and very entertaining.

One minor gripe I would love to see addressed in a future update are the mandatory level hints.  I’d prefer to puzzle out how to get past some areas on my own so it would be nice to have an option to disable hints.  It’s been many years since I looked at the original game, so the hints may have been mandatory back then also.  (I’m glad I remember very little of the original, the game feels almost new to me and I remember nothing of the dialog or basic plot.)

I’ve only played the first few levels, but unless something goes horribly wrong later, this is a solid four star title and something that fans of older single player FPS sci-fi adventures should really enjoy.

(Steps onto soapbox…)

I wish Quest developers would stop releasing unfinished games. Meta shouldn’t be approving them for sale on the store until they are finished. I suspect buggy games are one of the main issues keeping the Quest from going mainstream.  Gamers coming from a system like the Nintendo Switch to the Quest and expecting games for sale on the store to be finished are in for a rude awakening.  It’s gotten so bad that when a Quest game is released that’s actually playable from beginning to end without hitting any annoying technical issues, it seems like a minor miracle.  Even Meta’s flagship title, Asgard’s Wrath 2, was released in a seriously buggy state, without even taking advantage of the Quest 3’s extra power, which ironically it was bundled with to promote. (Thankfully it’s in great shape now.)

The last miracle game launch I’ve seen on the Quest was Propagation: Paradise Hotel and that was over a year ago.

I gave Bulletstorm a second chance, but many wouldn’t.  YouTube channels rarely revisit games they panned at launch to spread the word that they’ve been fixed up. Gamers that skipped the game because of bad reviews or quickly requested refunds are probably not aware that the games have improved.

The old saying “you only get one chance to make a first impression” very much applies to games.

Unfortunately Bulletstorm likely lost a lot of sales and a ton of revenue by releasing in a poor state.  It’s a shame because from what I’ve seen so far it’s a great time now.

(…steps down from soapbox.)

developer_response.body: We can't thank you enough for updating your review; it means the world to us! We're thrilled to know you're enjoying the latest updates. We've been working hard on the graphics, reload mechanics, the new Horde mode, and much more this time. We're glad to have earned your 5-star rating and appreciate your continued support. Enjoy <3

reviews.review_description: I'm Sooo disappointed. They cut most of the game. I was a fan of the original and bought it on several systems, including the switch. A huge part in the middle of the game is just not there.  Be prepared to play 20% of the game.  I'm thinking of asking for a refund.

developer_response.body: Hi Spiderhamster - We hear you and understand your frustration with the content from the original Bulletstorm not present in this VR version. We hope you've been able to play the new Trishka levels that are not available in the flat version. Thank you for playing and being a passionate Bulletstorm fan.

reviews.review_description: Got this on release, but refunded as it felt unfinished. Got it again on sale as it has been patched and I have to say I found it a lot of fun. However I was disappointed that large chunks of the original flatscreen game were missing, which made the experience seem short even with the additional levels. Still a lot of fun while it lasts and the controls are well implemented , it is a pity we will probably never see a sequel, but how about a VR Painkiller game?

developer_response.body: Thank you for giving Bulletstorm VR another chance! We've made a number of improvements since launch and we're glad you were able to finally experience the gameplay in a much better form. We understand the frustration you have with the content in the flat version not being available in Bulletstorm VR. We had to sacrifice some segments from the original for the best compatibility with VR and scope, and we hope players understand. Thank you for playing.

reviews.review_description:
It takes genuine talent to be so bad at your job that sliding at super speed, while whipping someone into a catus is boring.  
Game looks okay, story is the same insane nonsense of the flat-screen release but the real travesty here is the gameplay, the move to VR should have been an easy lay up but the developers fumbled the ball so hard its impressive.  

1/5 (Absolute garbage)

developer_response.body: I'm sorry to hear the game hasn't lived up to your expectations, Kindred209. We do have future updates in the works that add more polish, and we hope you will give us another try.

reviews.review_description:
At first I gave the game 4 stars because I had a lot of fun. In my opinion, the game was implemented really well in VR. Above all, the whip mechanics were implemented very well. The only thing that annoyed me was the outdated graphics and the lack of German synchro.

After I finished the game, I knew that there were a lot of levels missing. So I played through the flat version again to compare.

Basically, it's a shame to leave out so much. The two (very good) trishka levels don't make up for that.

Starting with shortening the opening level, where the window of the spaceship is blown up. Something like that is fun, especially in VR.

Furthermore, the brilliant dinosaur park with the miniature city and the remote-controlled dinosaurs is missing.

Then the toxic prison level, which is important for the story.

running through the fallen skyscraper and the gamma storm.

And last but not least, the great level with the carnivorous plants is missing, so the boss fight with the giant plant that swallowed Ishi is also missing.

So for 40 euros we only get half the game.

Furthermore, I don't understand why the loaded shot for the shotgun costs 1000 credits. In the flat version there are 400. And the penetrator is useless because you have to reload it after every shot. In the flat version, the weapon reloads automatically after every shot.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the feedback regarding the reduced content. We will forward this to our development team for review.

reviews.review_description: Terrible performance and very sluggish gun movement.  Seems like an overly aggressive smoothing that can't be adjusted or turned off.

developer_response.body: Hi there, we're looking to address these performance issues in an upcoming patch. We'll keep players updated once it's ready.

reviews.review_description:
Ignoring the frequent crashes, terrible AI and glitches which make certain weapons nearly unusable, I'm especially disappointed by the large amount of cut content, with entire acts from the original game missing, replaced by bland and boring Trishka "exclusive content". You spend a few minutes running about repurposed maps from the flatscreen version with no banter or story instead of killing hordes enemies with a remote-controlled mechanical dinosaur...

This game is like watching a poor movie adaptation of your favourite book.

developer_response.body: Hey, thank you for the thorough review and feeedback. We're reading every single review and logging what everyone has said so that we can work with the developers to patch the game. Please bare with us!

reviews.review_description:
This game is such a bad port. They could have made this so much better for the quest, yet they decide to release and unfinished mess of a game. What a waste of £30 DO NOT BUY. 
The frame-rate is Awful 
The game play is so dry and really 2d cutscenes I’m here to play Vr and truly be amazed not watch a screen for the next 10 minutes.
This is a huge disappointment to the vr industry, The game crashed 5 minutes into loading the game and repeatedly kept crashing. why bring out and unplayable game.
The graphics are so bad it actually made me feel sick and that rarely happens.
The Meta quest 3 is so much more powerful then this. WHY Doesn’t developers show how powerful it really is. 
Don’t buy I STRONGLY suggest unless you want to waste your money.
Refunding

developer_response.body: We apologize for the poor experience you're having. We've recently released patch 1.2, which addresses many of the concerns you've raised. Please consider updating your review if the patch has improved your gameplay experience!

reviews.review_description:
Slow paced, quest 1 looking textures with last gen graphics with awful video cut scenes.  Go buy the pc version and use vorpx.  As a quest 3 user this is a slap in the face.

Turning in game cut scenes into extremely low res videos was an awful mistake.  Wrecks the feel of the original game

Awful gfx and textures. Plays worse than the original pc release.

** Thanks for a patch that does nothing about the awful looking game.  Can oculus please remove this from my account as its pure rubbish.  I don't want the money back just please get the rubbish off my purchase list it's embarrassing.

developer_response.body: We're sorry you had a negative experience. We're working towards releasing graphical updates in future patches. We patched the game on Jan 26 with some critical improvements. We'd love it if you could give the game another try and update your review based on your experience now.

reviews.review_description: I asked for a refund this game is not working properly and they denied me WTF man

developer_response.body:
Hi there. Is there any way we can assist in getting your game up and running?

(P.S Meta is responsible for refunds, not People Can Fly, if your review is purely related to that, please consider updating your review)

reviews.review_description: add the Ukrainian language

developer_response.body: Thank you for the feedback, we'll forward your suggestion to the dev team.

reviews.review_description: I'll update once a patch rolls out to fix the miscellaneous crashes.

developer_response.body: Hey there, we recently rolled out a patch for the Meta Quest and we hope you have some time to check it out. If the patch has improved your gameplay experience, please consider updating your review!

reviews.review_description:
Based on other reviews immediately opened this with Quest Games Optimizer and upped resolution, cpu and gpu and so far the game looks and runs great for me (I'm on Quest 3).

b i t , l y / b u l l e t s v r (while it lasts)

developer_response.body: Glad to see that you're enjoying the game with the Quest 3 tweaks enabled. Thanks for your review <3

reviews.review_description: I was waiting so long for this game. Out of all the games that were released and or announce before the holiday season this was the last one on the horizon for me. Unfortunately, it’s a disappointment and I’m tired of games being built up just to let me down. I don’t know if Meta doesn’t offer developers enough support or what the problem is but this is a reoccurring issue. I can say there is a lot of potential here the actual gameplay and movement felt good when it worked properly. The game could look good but would need a big update . I’m not gonna go into detail and do a  in depth review. I don’t really do reviews and there’s plenty of others that will pick this thing apart. I’m just here to vent my frustration because that’s the only way this gets fixed…if it does. I honestly think everything‘s here for it to become a good game it just wasn’t ready. Like so many other quest games this thing is half baked and needs to go back in the oven. I’m refunding it if the developers fix this, which I really hope they do I’ll purchase it again but as it stands there is no way this is a $40 game.￼ The quest needs good campaign based games. I am so tired of rogue like games pleas finish it.

developer_response.body: We hear your frustration and understand completly. We'll be addressing a lof of the issues we've been seeing in the reviews with a series of patches shortly.

reviews.review_description:
Graphics quite good on the quest 3, and was quite enjoyable but not much put into the game, straight forward shoot shoot shoot that's it apart from whiping stuff with the leash I did like that and different ways to kill with it, and the laser sword I'll call it when you have it, some great guns as well like the sniper rifle where you control the bullets with your head, but the down fall for me is because it is just shoot shoot 95% of the time, and really short and easy on normal and hard, a lot more could have been done with the game with stuff to do and the length of it, it's a shame and not worth the money even with the bit discount I got for pre ordering ages ago, it's worth maybe £15 at the most if that

I still give it 3 stars as despite same old same old and really short it was enjoyable and funny at times and now I can't get a refund it'll be in my library to pass the time again one day, If there's a squeal one day, just make it longer and more stuff to do and we can kill that nob of a general

developer_response.body: Thank you for the honest review. We're actively looking into ways to improve gameplay, which we hope to address in upcoming patches.

reviews.review_title: Big graphics and enemy AI improvements!!
reviews.review_description: I never played Bulletstorm flat but from the trailer and the name I knew what to expect.  The fast paced action, over the top voice acting, and violence were expected and Bulletstorm delivered on those things.  Developers have continued to improve the graphics and enemy AI and that is very much appreciated!  Enemies take cover and attack in ways that make a lot more sense.  There have been noticeable upgrades to textures and lots of smaller quality of life improvements.  Thank you for supporting the game!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review. We've been working diligently to roll out improvements. We're glad you've noticed them. If you feel appropriate, we'd love 5 stars <3

reviews.review_description: Full review on YouTube: @superhippieman

developer_response.body: There's a lot of potential! We're working on improving the game as best as we can; stay tuned for updates.

reviews.review_description: After some updates the game became much much better! The graphics looks nice and the gameplay is pure fun. So give it a try, you won‘t be dissapointed :)

developer_response.body: Thanks for the 5 stars! <3

reviews.review_description: Not sure why there are so many negative reviews. It’s not perfect. But. Mine ran just fine froze one time but didn’t lose anything. Graphics are good. Controls are tight. Playing on quest 2 by the way.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review, we're glad you're enjoying the game. Let us know if you come across any issues and we'll be happy to address them.

reviews.review_description: Game would go for a few minutes and the it starts crashing😑😑😑 sucks when you pay a lot for a buggy game😖 hopefully the developers will get it fixed.

developer_response.body: We're aware of the crahses and are actively working on a patch to fix it. Bare with us as we get it sorted!

reviews.review_description: I find it fun the only problems I have with it are how you activate the charges it would be fun if you had to do it like in the game with the sniper and the assault rifle the sniper you could pump it like in the original same with the assault rifle you could rack it but it’s still fun also the commander girls blades are a little finicky and it crashes somewhat often but it’s fine other than that. Update it’s fun the sniper works it doesn’t crash it’s very fun still kinda sad they are still missing half the game though

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review. We're glad you're having fun post-patch and enjoying the new content! Thank you for the 5 stars <3

reviews.review_description: Graphics  game play good ,good story  great buy really enjoy playing game not for youngsters du to graphic natur and swearing, top game

developer_response.body:
Yes, the game is very M for Mature :D
Thank you for the five star review.

reviews.review_description: This game is extremely entertaining and fun to play

developer_response.body: We're glad you're enjoying the game! Thank you for the 5 star review!

reviews.review_description: Amazing game, I have fond memories of this on the Xbox 360 , and the VR experience takes it to another level... Got to get used to some different control methods, otherwise not an issue at all...... Brilliant...

developer_response.body: The 360 days were the best days. We're glad you're enjoying yourself on the VR version!

reviews.review_description: Listen ya’ll, this game could be better. That’s for sure. Hopefully at some point it’ll get a quest 3 update to make it look better. But I will say I’m having a blast. The mechanics work pretty well and some of the big set pieces are still pretty cool. Definitely use a referral code or wait for a sale for this one. Not worth the full $40, but worth a play through.

developer_response.body: Hey there, we recently launched a patch for the Meta Quest 3. We're glad you're enjoying the game so far, but definitely try it out with the new patch and if you like it, we'd love 5 stars.

reviews.review_description: Always been a fan of bullet storm and now I can play it in VR only thing that can make this better is if I could kick instead of using a button

developer_response.body: Physical kicking would be awesome, but we also think your legs would be tired pretty quickly after kicking so much Stygia scum in the face ;) Thank you for the review, and enjoy the rest of the game!

reviews.review_description: Love it

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review <3

reviews.review_description: Its an overall okay game combats rewarding but why is it missing half the game it skips the whole collapsed building and robot dinosaur and flytrap boss

developer_response.body: Hi there, thank you for the 4 star review and we understand your disappointment. Going into Bulletstorm VR we've added new exclusive levels featuring Trishka as a playable character with new Energy Blade weapons. Acts 2, 4, and a portion of Act 6 from the original 2011 version of Bulletstorm are not present in Bulletstorm VR, along with their related achievements.

reviews.review_description:
This game is giving me a lot of fun. 
And that is the point.
That kind of gameplay is the best for me.

developer_response.body: Fun gameplay is the best gameplay!  Thanks for your review <3

reviews.review_description:
Pros:
• Fun to play
• Good story 
• Action Packed

Cons:
• The loading screen that you’re constantly going into when entering a new place, honestly you’ll walk into the new area and then it will take you to a loading screen for 5-8 seconds when honestly it’s not necessary to have.
• Cutscenes are not in VR.. there is a mechanic you can turn on that makes the cutscene a little more 3-D but not to the potential the developers 
could have made them. 

This is a case of pure laziness on the developers part. Overall the game is OK but $40.00 is asking too much honestly, even though I did pay that.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We're looking into addressing some of the issues you've brought up with our developers. We'll be releasing a patch shortly!
